heat_gap.basis: Standard tariffs, July 2026 pass (Power NI/UR review, ROI standard 24h rates) - dagger; time-of-use and night tariffs materially lower for heat-pump households. Oil prices live. Kerosene 10.35 kWh/L; boiler efficiencies 82%/85% dagger. Challenge and input welcome at contact@causewaygt.com

hero.basis: Scaffold estimator (dagger throughout) - annual anchors shaped by the week's island HDD; SEAI 2024, DfE/NISRA, Causeway estimates. Challenge and input welcome at contact@causewaygt.com

flags: Verification pending that parsed values are the NI average series, not a council-area series
ccni_oil.source: Consumer Council for Northern Ireland home heating oil price checker - daily (Mon-Fri), NI average, 300/500/900 L

ecb_fx.source: ECB euro foreign exchange reference rates (daily)

eirgrid.pending_note: Smart Grid Dashboard redesigned ~09 Jul 2026 - DashboardService.svc returns 503 from all networks; awaiting browser XHR probe for the replacement endpoint

gni_ckan.source: Gas Networks Ireland via data.gov.ie, CC BY 4.0 - quarterly refresh, calibration series

gni_live.jurisdiction_note: DM/NDM carry no ROI prefix while LDM and Power Gen do - whether unprefixed series include NI exits is unconfirmed; regression remains on the confirmed-ROI calibration series until resolved
gni_live.source: Gas Networks Ireland Data Transparency - gasconsumption API, daily by market sector

hdd.weights_note: Population weights are current Causeway Energies estimates - challenge and input welcome at contact@causewaygt.com

flags: Bulletin heading is gas oil; treated as ROI heating-oil (kerosene) price level - Causeway judgement
oil_bulletin.source: European Commission Weekly Oil Bulletin - prices with and without taxes

flags: Monthly official series - lags the daily NI survey by design; unit basis autodetected
ons_gb_oil.source: ONS average heating oil price, GB (series kj5u) - monthly, same tax regime as NI

semopx.source: SEMOpx day-ahead market results - dual currency (EUR/GBP), incl. SEM trading-day FX rate

notes: Feed statuses - ok: fetched and current; lagging: fetched, source publishes on a lag; stale: fetch failed, previous values retained. Judgement figures are current Causeway Energies estimates - challenge and input welcome at contact@causewaygt.com
